Created attachment 210876
cargo-generate-0.5.0.diff

Developer tool to help you get up and running
quickly with a new Rust project by leveraging
a pre-existing git repository as a template.

WWW: https://github.com/ashleygwilliams/cargo-generate

QA: 
  * Portlint: Looks fine;
  * Poudriere: Package built, application works as intended.
